node.excerpt: This site was made, primarily, as a vehicle for my résumé. It could have been a one-day thing. Just find a pretty wordpress template, customize it a bit, and voilà! But where's the fun in that? I mean, what self-respecting dev doesn't love a good…

"loremdipso"? What's that? Did you mean lorem ipsum? Or, ipso facto maybe? Ah, well, let me take you back to the summer of 1992, when I was born. The story I've been told is that my sister wanted to name me after that kid on the Kix commercial. You…
